# Embedding Model Compatibility

<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate-embedding-models-reference.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->

This reference lists the embedding-provider/model combinations that the repo names, defaults, tests, or documents directly.
The provider adapters can accept other provider-specific model names, but those are operator-validated extensions: confirm vector dimension, context window, task-prefix requirements, and index rebuild impact before sharing the resulting model id.

Generated source of truth:

- Provider defaults and accepted providers: `src/config/provider.ts`.
- Task-prefix behavior: `src/embedding-provider.ts`.
- Paid-provider cost tiers: `src/cost-estimates.ts`.
- External dimension/context references: [Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B model card](https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B); [Nomic text embedding docs](https://docs.nomic.ai/atlas/embeddings-and-retrieval/text-embedding); [OpenAI embeddings guide](https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/embeddings); [BGE small model card](https://huggingface.co/BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5).

Run `npm run docs:generate-embedding-models` after changing any of those source values. The `docs:check-embedding-models` gate fails if this file drifts.

## Compatibility Matrix

| Provider | Model name | Model id | Vector dimensions | Task prefixes | Repo status | Switch-over notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ollama | <code>dengcao/Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B:Q8_0</code> | <code>ollama__dengcao-Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B-Q8_0</code> | 1024 | No | Default local production model. Requires Ollama and the pulled model. | Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B has a 32k context window and configurable output dimensions up to 1024; this server does not pass a custom dimension parameter. |
| ollama | <code>nomic-embed-text or nomic-embed-text:latest</code> | <code>ollama__nomic-embed-text / ollama__nomic-embed-text-latest</code> | 768 | Yes: `search_document: ` for documents, `search_query: ` for queries | Supported example model. Prefix behavior is covered by `src/embedding-provider.test.ts`. | Pin the exact tag consistently. The model id is derived from the name as typed, so `nomic-embed-text` and `nomic-embed-text:latest` use different index directories. |
| openai | <code>text-embedding-3-small</code> | <code>openai__text-embedding-3-small</code> | 1536 | No | Default OpenAI model. Requires `OPENAI_API_KEY` and paid API usage. | Cost prompts use the rule-of-thumb table in `src/cost-estimates.ts` (last verified 2026-04-26). |
| openai | <code>text-embedding-3-large</code> | <code>openai__text-embedding-3-large</code> | 3072 | No | Supported by the generic OpenAI provider path and explicit cost tier. | Higher storage and memory footprint than the default small model; run `kb models add ... --dry-run` before embedding a large corpus. |
| openai | <code>text-embedding-ada-002</code> | <code>openai__text-embedding-ada-002</code> | 1536 | No | Legacy-compatible override, not the default. | Existing indexes can keep using this model id; new deployments should prefer the current OpenAI default unless they need compatibility. |
| huggingface | <code>BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5</code> | <code>huggingface__BAAI-bge-small-en-v1.5</code> | 384 | No | Default HuggingFace model. Requires `HUGGINGFACE_API_KEY`. | Uses the Hugging Face Inference Providers router unless `HUGGINGFACE_ENDPOINT_URL` is set. |
| huggingface | <code>nomic-ai/nomic-embed-text-v1.5</code> | <code>huggingface__nomic-ai-nomic-embed-text-v1.5</code> | 768 by default; Matryoshka sizes 512, 256, 128, and 64 exist upstream | Yes: `search_document: ` for documents, `search_query: ` for queries | Supported by the generic HuggingFace provider path and the nomic prefix matcher. | This server does not configure reduced Matryoshka output dimensions, so use a separate model id/index if you add such support later. |
| fake | <code>any model name</code> | <code>Testing-only provider; not part of the production model-id catalogue</code> | 256 by default; `KB_FAKE_DIM` clamps to 8-4096 | No | CI/offline fixtures only. Never use for retrieval quality. | Deterministic hash-bag embeddings for tests and local fixtures; model name is metadata only. |

## Reindex Rules

- Changing provider, model name, output dimension, or task-prefix behavior creates a different vector space. Build or refresh the target model index before switching active traffic to it.
- `model_id` is derived from `(provider, model_name)` as typed. Tags and slashes are normalized for the filesystem, but semantically equivalent names are not canonicalized.
- Nomic-family models require role-specific task prefixes while `KB_EMBEDDING_TASK_PREFIXES` is enabled. Indexes built before that behavior need a reindex before prefixed queries are comparable.
- FAISS indexes are dimension-specific. Do not point an existing model directory at a model with a different output dimension.
- For paid providers, run `kb models add <provider> <model> --dry-run` first so the CLI prints the estimated token cost before any embedding traffic.
